measurement_note: Size is n, the Users row count. The legal 64/256/1024 all-valid tiers span 16x and use reverse insertion order. The accepted anchored predicate scans total mail text in O(S), while the deterministic app-local order is conservatively O(S + n log n). An independent linear-filter query passes. A correct cross join grouped back to one row per user processes n^2 pairs, completes all tiers, and is rejected only by scaling.

cases.name: benchmark: 64 valid users in reverse insertion order
benchmark: 256 valid users in reverse insertion order
benchmark: 1024 valid users in reverse insertion order
